generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor for real-time environmental monitoring in building control systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor for indoor climate monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO2 sensor for air quality monitoring in building spaces"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor for space utilization tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance AirFlowSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Air flow sensor for HVAC system performance monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirFlowDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance AirFlowDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirFlowSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity measurements from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "CO2 concentration data for indoor air quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy status data for space utilization analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance AirFlowData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Air flow rate data for HVAC system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirFlowDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance HVACValveActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC valve actuator for controlling thermal comfort"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuator for automated illumination control"
]

instance DamperActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Air damper actuator for airflow regulation"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono protocol for bidirectional real-time data exchange between physical and digital twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin synchronization and device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for transforming enriched BIM models into structured digital artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric foundation of the building with semantic annotations for Building Control Systems components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time monitoring of building operations through integrated sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateVisualization
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure performance forecasting using historical and real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceForecastInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational processes for energy efficiency and cost reduction"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance SystemStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of system states for facility managers to monitor and control infrastructure"
]

instance PerformanceForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted infrastructure performance metrics for proactive decision-making"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC settings for energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building environment integrating all control systems and sensors"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, CO2Sensor, OccupancySensor, AirFlowSensor, HVACValveActuator, LightingActuator, DamperActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication via Eclipse Hono and Ditto enables Facility Managers to interact with the deployed Digital Twin for real-time monitoring and control of physical assets."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points enables integration of custom services and analytics; DT Framework serves as a central hub coordinating roles (Building Control Engineers for device modeling, Facility Managers for real-time monitoring/control, DT Engineers for service integration) to facilitate bidirectional data exchange and holistic building lifecycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle begins with device modeling in BIM by Building Control Engineers, followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to generate deployable artifacts. Real-time data exchange and interactive visualization support operational monitoring by Facility Managers, while modular architecture allows evolution through custom services integration by DT Engineers."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connectivity is managed through Eclipse Hono and Ditto, which handle real-time data exchange and metadata extraction (e.g., endpoint addresses), forming a central hub for bidirectional communication between physical and virtual components."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Non-functional requirements address interoperability across heterogeneous systems through standardized extension points for custom service integration, supporting scalability from individual components to entire infrastructure systems and maintainability via low-overhead updates."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points within the modular architecture support integration of custom services and analytics, ensuring interoperability and system extensibility."
]
